summary: Clear audience recording that captures the concert‑going feeling well.
review: Both reviewers praise this audience tape for its solid sound quality and its ability to convey the live atmosphere of the show. While no specific musical moments are highlighted, the recording is described as sounding great and evoking the feeling of being in the crowd.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments on sound quality and concert feel from two brief reviews; limited detail on performance keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound described as great; captures the audience ambience well, no noted flaws.
